commands.review_summary:
The PR adds tolerant internal dispatcher failed-count reads in auto-reply accounting and Feishu fallback paths while preserving the required `ReplyDispatcher.getFailedCounts` contract.

PR surface: Source +24, Tests +35. Total +59 across 5 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows current main calls `dispatcher.getFailedCounts().final` without a guard, so a runtime dispatcher missing that method follows a clear TypeError path; I did not execute tests in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - No ClawSweeper repair lane is needed; review findings are empty and the existing PR can proceed through automerge or maintainer landing gates.

commands.review_summary:
The PR forwards heartbeat status into context-engine `afterTurn` calls from the harness, embedded runner, and Codex app-server harness, with regression tests for true, false, and omitted cases.

PR surface: Source +10, Tests +98. Total +108 across 6 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source inspection gives a high-confidence reproduction path: current main declares `afterTurn(params).isHeartbeat` but omits the field from both active runtime delivery helpers. I did not run the full gateway heartbeat scenario in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Contributor action is needed for the proof-gate format, and the code change also has a simple typecheck blocker; do not queue automated repair while real behavior proof is still rejected.
